title: PreviewToken
description: A preview token that grants access to a private CodeSandbox sandbox preview.

token_id.description: Unique identifier for this preview token

token_prefix.description: A prefix of the token value (safe to display)

expires_at.description: UTC timestamp when this token expires. Null if the token never expires.

last_used_at.description: UTC timestamp of when this token was last used. Null if never used.
